channel.title: Cash-Secured Puts on pras.io
channel.description: Recent content in Cash-Secured Puts on pras.io

item.title: The Wheel Strategy, Part 2: Selling Puts — The Entry Side
item.description: The put side of the wheel is where your income generation begins. Here's how to select a strike, size a position, collect premium, and manage the trade — including when things don't go to plan.
